creator: almindor@gmail.com
text:
gnomesu is broken. The events for buttons are not bound in it. I get these errors:

(gnomesu:2171): libglade-WARNING **: could not find signal handler 'on_gtk_command_textbox_activate'.

(gnomesu:2171): libglade-WARNING **: could not find signal handler 'on_gtk_password_textbox_activate'.

(gnomesu:2171): libglade-WARNING **: could not find signal handler 'on_gtk_ok_button_clicked'.

(gnomesu:2171): libglade-WARNING **: could not find signal handler 'on_gtk_cancel_button_clicked'.

(gnomesu:2171): libglade-WARNING **: could not find signal handler 'quit_program'.

Fix: 

Probably something with glade/code glue part.
How-To-Repeat: Just start it
